name: My projects
title: works
description: Real projects launched in production and solving business problems.

projects.title: My-UI — a template platform where users publish solutions and compete by rating
projects.description: A production service for the UI community: authors submit templates for moderation, publish them in the catalog, collect likes, and reach the top showcase. Implemented features include author profiles, favorites, categories, tags, copy statistics, and a complete template management cycle.

characteristics.title: Key features
list: User catalog with template publishing and author profiles
Likes/favorites, code copying, moderation, and rating showcase
Server architecture on NestJS + PostgreSQL with a scalable data model
Roles and moderation layer for user content quality control
Activity and popularity metrics for templates to drive engagement

projects.title: "Ona Hochet" — a large-scale commercial flower delivery project across Russia
projects.description: A full-featured e-commerce platform: catalog, shopping cart, checkout, recipient scenarios, and address delivery. The system implements multi-city support (subdomains and Russian cities), integrations with amoCRM, Telegram notifications, and operational order processing logic.

characteristics.title: Key features
list: Online flower sales and delivery across numerous Russian cities
Integrations: amoCRM, Telegram notifications, city-based routing
Thoughtful checkout: recipient, addressing, delivery date/time, special requests
Catalog, inventory, product cards, and orders with business processing logic
Multi-city and storefront routing for regional scenarios

projects.title: "Launch System" — a sales platform for launching an educational product
projects.description: A product landing page for the Phenomen Club course with deep content structure: Hero section, modular program, pricing matrix, FAQ, trust blocks, and final funnel. The main goal of the project is converting traffic into applications and payments through a clear user journey.

characteristics.title: Key features
list: Strong marketing page structure for selling an educational product
Modular presentation of the program and pricing to increase conversion
Adaptive funnel from the first screen to application/payment without extra steps
Clear UX hierarchy for high trust and a transparent offer
Conversion optimization: emphasis on value, objections, and CTAs
